changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Analysis whether user solved with the pre-recorded solution (high rate could be a sign of cheating)

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: create db cache for opening data

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: refactor db cache for opening data

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.sql: insert into move_analysis (ref_game_id, "position", fen_key, "depth", already_in_cache, raw_line, entry_creation) select m.reference_game_id, m."position", fen || CASE WHEN (a."position" % 2 = 0) THEN ' b - - 0 0' ELSE ' w - - 0 0' end as fen_key, "depth", false as already_in_cache, raw_line, entry_creation from reference_game_half_move_analysis a, reference_game_half_move m where a.reference_game_id = m.reference_game_id and a."position" = m."position";

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.sql: create or replace view move_analysis_coalesced as (SELECT id, CASE WHEN game_id is not null THEN 'PVP' WHEN bot_game_id is not null THEN 'PVB' WHEN ref_game_id is not null THEN 'DB' END game_type, coalesce (game_id, bot_game_id, ref_game_id ) game_data_id, ma.position, ma.fen_key, ma.depth, ma.already_in_cache, ma.raw_line, ma.entry_creation from move_analysis ma );

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Re-create engine cache materialized views properly

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.sql: update game set always_visible_in_lobby = true where time_control_category = 'CORRESPONDENCE' or time_control_category = 'SEVERAL_DAYS';

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Flag some games as containing errors

changeSet.author: benckx

update.where: description IS NOT NULL AND description != ''

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Recreate move_analysis_coalesced view dropped in 0090 for the timestamptz migration
changeSet.sql: create or replace view move_analysis_coalesced as (SELECT id, CASE WHEN game_id is not null THEN 'PVP' WHEN bot_game_id is not null THEN 'PVB' WHEN ref_game_id is not null THEN 'DB' END game_type, coalesce (game_id, bot_game_id, ref_game_id ) game_data_id, ma.position, ma.fen_key, ma.depth, ma.already_in_cache, ma.raw_line, ma.entry_creation from move_analysis ma );

changeSet.author: benckx
benckx
changeSet.comment: Delete persisted "empty" searches (all criteria null/blank) that were stored before the empty-criteria guard was added.

delete.where: (player_name IS NULL OR player_name = '') AND player_id IS NULL AND player_color IS NULL AND (event_name IS NULL OR event_name = '') AND event_id IS NULL AND search_start IS NULL AND search_end IS NULL AND (fen IS NULL OR fen = '')

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Add email confirmation fields to user table (separate from automated email_verification)

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Add variant column to game and bot_game tables for Manchu variant support

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Anonymous sample of cookie-based user preferences

changeSet.author: benckx
changeSet.comment: Indexes to optimize page view analytics queries
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX page_view_event_event_time_index ON page_view_event (event_time); CREATE INDEX page_view_event_event_path_index ON page_view_event (event_path text_pattern_ops);
